title: gladiolus segetum subsp. guepinii
intro: Gladiolus segetum subsp. guepinii is a plant species belonging to the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the gladiolus of the fields or field gladiolus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus segetum subsp. guepinii include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus segetum subsp. guepinii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
